title: mojangless
description:
A thinner version of default minecraft font with support of many languages.
The pack was archived because of problems it had. (Maybe not forever)
body: Mojangles*s* is a thinner version of default minecraft mojangles font, that was inspired by the font of [Faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless) resource pack still using  only its own textures.
